tfcthings.maximum_sharpness: This tool is already at maximum sharpness.
tfcthings.sharpening_requires_other_hand: Hold a sharpenable tool in the other hand.
tfcthings.tooltip.rope_bridge_too_long: Мост слишком длинный для имеющихся материалов!
tfcthings.tooltip.rope_bridge_exceeds_ma: Мост не может превышать %s блоков в длину!
tfcthings.tooltip.fishing_net.anchors_sa: Anchors must be on the same Y level
tfcthings.tooltip.fishing_net.anchors_al: Anchors must be aligned on X or Z
tfcthings.tooltip.fishing_net.anchors_to: Anchors are too far apart (max 32 blocks)
tfcthings.tooltip.fishing_net.no_water: No valid water column found between anchors
tfcthings.tooltip.fishing_net.anchor_sam: Anchor must be on same y level
tfcthings.tooltip.fishing_net.no_anchor_: No anchor found on x or z axis
tfcthings.tooltip.prohammer_na: Этот блок не может вызвать обвал.
tfcthings.tooltip.prohammer_safe: Эта область кажется безопасной для добычи.
jei.tfcthings.snow_shoes.desc: Footwear that allows you to walk on snow without sinking. Wear them in the boots slot to traverse snowy terrain with ease.
jei.tfcthings.hiking_boots.desc: Sturdy boots that increase your movement speed when climbing slopes. Wear them in the boots slot to make mountain traversal easier.
jei.tfcthings.rope_bridge_bundle.desc: A bundle of rope and planks that can be thrown to create a rope bridge. Right-click to throw it at a target location - it will automatically create a walkable bridge between you and where it lands.
jei.tfcthings.rope_bridge.desc: A walkable rope bridge plank. These are placed automatically when throwing a Rope Bridge Bundle.
jei.tfcthings.rope_ladder.desc: A climbable rope ladder that can be placed on walls. Unlike regular ladders, rope ladders will automatically extend downward when placed.
jei.tfcthings.rope_javelin.desc: A javelin with a rope attached. Throw it at a surface and a rope will connect you to the javelin, allowing you to climb up or retrieve the javelin by pulling the rope.
jei.tfcthings.hook_javelin.desc: A grappling javelin with a hooked tip. Throw it at a surface and swing from the rope like a pendulum. Right-click while airborne to retract rope and climb up. Sneak + right-click to retrieve the javelin. Sneak while hanging to extend the rope downward.
jei.tfcthings.hook_javelin_head.desc: A hooked javelin head component for crafting a Hook Javelin. Forge on an anvil from a double metal ingot.
jei.tfcthings.bear_trap.desc: A dangerous trap for large animals. Place it on the ground and it will snap shut when stepped on, immobilizing and damaging the creature. Use a shovel to safely disarm it.
jei.tfcthings.bear_trap_half.desc: Half of a bear trap. Combine two halves together to create a functional Bear Trap.
jei.tfcthings.snare.desc: A passive trap for catching small animals and birds. Place it on the ground and add bait by right-clicking with food. Over time, it may catch animals native to the local climate.
jei.tfcthings.fishing_net.desc: A deployable fishing net for rivers. Place it across flowing water to passively catch fish. Right-click to deploy between two anchor points.
jei.tfcthings.fishing_net_segment.desc: A segment of a deployed fishing net. These are placed automatically when deploying a Fishing Net across water.
jei.tfcthings.fishing_net_anchor.desc: An anchor point for a fishing net. Stores caught fish - right-click to collect the catch.
jei.tfcthings.rope.desc: A rope that appears in your hand when a Rope Javelin is thrown. Right-click to pull yourself toward the javelin or retract a captured entity. The rope transforms back into the javelin when retracted.
jei.tfcthings.crown.desc: A decorative crown crafted from precious metal. Forge an empty crown on an anvil from a metal sheet, then set a gemstone using a hammer in the crafting grid. Crowns provide no armor protection and are worn in the helmet slot.
jei.tfcthings.gem_display.desc: A decorative stone block for showcasing a single cut gemstone. Right-click with a gem to place it on display, or right-click with an empty hand to retrieve it. Crafted from smooth stone and a chisel.
jei.tfcthings.surveyors_hammer.desc: A specialized survey hammer for miners. Right-click a block to check if the surrounding area is safe from cave-ins. Sneak + right-click to scan for rock layers below - higher tier metals can scan deeper. Crafted by forging a Surveyor's Hammer Head on an anvil or casting one in a mold, then assembling with a stick.
jei.tfcthings.surveyors_hammer_head.desc: A hammer head component for crafting a Surveyor's Hammer. Forge on an anvil from a metal ingot, or cast in a Surveyor's Hammer Head Mold.
jei.tfcthings.surveyors_hammer_head_mold: A ceramic mold for casting Surveyor's Hammer Heads. Knap the shape from clay, then fire in a kiln. Fill with molten metal to cast hammer heads.
jei.tfcthings.metal_bracing.desc: A metal reinforcement component. Forge from a wrought iron or steel ingot on an anvil. Used to craft Reinforced Slings and Hiking Boots.
jei.tfcthings.sling.desc: A leather sling for hurling rocks at enemies. Knap from leather, then hold right-click to charge and release to throw. Uses loose rocks as ammunition. Deals bonus damage to predators and skeletons.
jei.tfcthings.sling_metal.desc: A reinforced sling that can also fire metal ammunition. Craft by combining a sling with metal bracing. In addition to rocks, it can use all four types of metal sling ammo for enhanced effects.
jei.tfcthings.sling_ammo.desc: Heavy metal projectiles forged on an anvil from wrought iron or steel. Deals high bonus damage on impact. Can only be fired from a Reinforced Sling.
jei.tfcthings.sling_ammo_spread.desc: Sling ammo reshaped with a hammer to fragment on release, scattering into multiple projectiles. Less damage per hit but covers a wide area.
jei.tfcthings.sling_ammo_light.desc: Sling ammo refined with a hammer and chisel for improved aerodynamics. Travels faster with less arc, ideal for long-range shots.
jei.tfcthings.sling_ammo_fire.desc: Sling ammo packed with gunpowder and a fire starter. Ignites the target on impact, setting them ablaze for several seconds.
